title: Be Still Before the Lord,
and Wait Patiently
for Him.
hero.sub: Join us as we grow together in the love and grace of Jesus Christ. All are welcome!

about.heading:
A Place Where Every
Heart Finds Home
about.p1: Peniel Baptist Church Hakha is a Christian community dedicated to worshipping God, sharing the Gospel, and serving people with faith, love, and unity. Our church seeks to help individuals and families grow spiritually while building a caring and supportive community.
about.p2: To learn more about our story and how Peniel Baptist Church Hakha was established, please click the “Download” button below. You will receive a PDF file containing the detailed history of our church.

items.label: Our Community
items.body: We are a family — united by faith, strengthened by love, and called to serve one another and the world around us.

items.label: Our Mission
items.body: To proclaim the Gospel, make disciples of all nations, and demonstrate the Kingdom of God in practical, tangible ways.

items.label: Get Involved
items.body: From small groups to youth ministry, women's fellowship to worship teams — there is a place for everyone to serve and grow.

mission.heading: Serving with Purpose
mission.sub: We are called to proclaim the Gospel, make disciples, and demonstrate the Kingdom of God in practical ways across Hakha and beyond.

verse.text: For God so loved the world that He gave His one and only Son, that whoever believes in Him shall not perish but have eternal life.

cta.heading: New to PBC Hakha?
cta.sub: We'd love to meet you. Come join us this Sunday and experience the warmth of our church family.

footer.tagline: Growing together in faith, love, and community.
footer.copy: © 2025 PBC Hakha Church. All rights reserved.

hero.eyebrow: PBC Hakha In Kan In Don
title: Bawipa kha dai te
le lungsau tein
hngak ko.
hero.sub: Jesuh Khrih a dawtnak le a vel ngaihnak tang ah a thang mi kan sinah rak ra ve. Ahopaoh kan in don hna.

about.heading: Mi Lungthin Kip ah Inn ah Hmuh Mi Hmun
about.p1: Peniel Baptist Church Hakha cu Pathian biaknak, thawngtha bia i hrawmnak, le zumhnak, dawtnak, le lungrualnak he mi caah rian a ttuanmi Khrihfabu kan si. Kan Khrihfabu nih zohkhenhtu le bawmchantu ding ah zatlangbu dirh buin pumpak le chungkhar hna thlarau lei ah an ṭhancho khawh nakhnga lam a bawl tu kan si.
about.p2: Kan tuanbia le Peniel Baptist Church Hakha dirh a sinak kong fiang deuh in hngalh na duh ahcun a tanglei “Download” timi kha hmet. Kan khrihfabu tuanbia tling tein aa telmi PDF file na hmuh lai.

leaders.heading: A Kan Hruaitu Hna Hmanthlak Pawl

buildings.heading: Dawtnak He Philhlonak Caah Sakmi Inn Pawl

items.label: Kan Zumhnak
items.body: Kan si ruamhnak — lungngaknak-in ruam, hmunhmam-in zuam, le mino le khawthlang tangko ding.

items.label: Kan Tuanbia
items.body: Thuzang gen, thiamnak tein, le Pathian cozah khawthlang-ah hmanfang tein thleng.

items.label: Rian Ruam
items.body: Hna zumhnak, sungbawi sianginn, mipu pawlpi le biaknak hna — mi zawng zawng-ah hmun an um.

events.heading: Cawlcanghnak Tuah Ding Mi Ah Rak Kan Tel Pi Ve

mission.heading: Tinhmi Ngei Bu Tein Rianttuannak
mission.sub: Hakha khuachung le Hmun Zakip Ah Thawngtha phuan ding, zultu siter ding le Pathian Pennak Akarh khawhnak ding caah lamhmuhsak khawhnak ding rianttuantu kan si.

verse.text: Pathian in kha thlalang hmunhmam a si caan, a nupa Pa mi tangko in a pekmi, a man fiang ding, mi zeihmanh sih lo ding, tutan nupi nei ding a si.

cta.heading: PBC Haka-ah Thar Bia?
cta.sub: Kan hmuah duh. Thausing kan kan tlang ko le kan sianginn sungbawi hmunhmam hmuh.

footer.tagline: Zumhnak, Dawtnak le Zatlang Bu sinah thang ti hna usih!
footer.copy: © 2025 PBC Haka Pawlpi. Hna thawng kan zet.

buildings_items.history_en: BiakSung Villa was built in loving memory of a beloved member of our church family whose generosity and devotion to God left a lasting mark on the PBC Hakha community. Construction was made possible through the gifts of family members and friends who wished to honor a life of faith, service, and quiet sacrifice. Today the villa serves as a gathering place for fellowship, prayer, and ministry activities, standing as a lasting tribute to the legacy of faith passed down to future generations.
buildings_items.history_hk: Khar Nawn Villa kan timi inn hi kum 2018, May 17 ah Pu Bawi Hu inn Sing 1400 in kan rak cawkmi inn a si. Peniel Biakinn cu a hmet deuh caah le pehnak ding hmunhma kan ngeih ti lo caah Biakinn pehnak hmunhma ruah ah rak cawk mi a si. A hnulei ah Coka a um ii cucu kan theh hnuah Biakinn peh nakah kan hman. Inn pi le inn tang hi Pastor Thang Za Hnin te nih kum 2024, July 1 in an umnak. Rev Khar Nawn cu Peniel Baptist Church ah caantling riantuantu in kum 2007, February 1 ah rak lak a si i, kum khat a tuan hlan November 27 ah chunglei dam lonak in mual a kan liam tak mi kan Pastor hmasabik a si. Cucah amah min chiahnak caah tiin hi inn cawkmi cu “Khar Nawn Villa” tiah kan auh.

buildings_items.history_en: Kindergarten Villa was built in loving memory of a faithful servant of God who dedicated much of their life to the education and nurture of young children in the Hakha community. Families and church members came together to fund the construction as a tribute to that lifelong commitment to the next generation. The building now houses the churchs kindergarten classes, giving local children a warm and safe place to learn, play, and grow in faith from an early age.
buildings_items.history_hk: Kindergarten Villa hi Pathian rian thawktu pakhat, Haka khuanin fanu le ngakchia hna cawnpiaknak le khaltunnak ah a nun chungkhar a pek mi thlaktlak in sa a si. A chungkhar le pawlpi mi hna nih mino caah a hmangaihnak hi tlangpi awkah an vun a si. Tuhin hi inn hi pawlpi kindergarten sianginn ah a hman, hmun a hmunhmam le nungkam tein ngakchia hna nih an cawn, an dem le zumhnak ah an khang khawhnak ah a si.
